title: "US Bases Our Problem, Not Neighbours": Iranian Experts On Middle East Attacks
summary_full: Iranian experts said that Khamenei's death in the US-Israel strikes has "united the people of Iran".
summary_public: Iranian experts said that Khamenei's death in the US-Israel strikes has "united the people of Iran".
